title: Reset Password
content: To reset your password, go to Settings, open the Security section, and select the Reset Password option. Follow the instructions to create a new password.

title: Create Account
content: New users can create an account by clicking the Sign Up button on the homepage and providing a valid email address and password.

title: Delete Account
content: Users can permanently delete their account by navigating to Settings, selecting the Account section, and choosing the Delete Account option.

title: Update Profile Information
content: Users can edit their personal details such as name, bio, and other profile information from the Profile section in account settings.

title: Contact Customer Support
content: If users need assistance, they can contact customer support by sending an email to support@company.com or submitting a request through the Help Center.

title: Change Email Address
content: Users can update their registered email address from Settings under the Account section after confirming their password.

title: Enable Two-Factor Authentication
content: For additional security, users can enable two-factor authentication by going to Settings, selecting Security, and activating the 2FA option.

title: Disable Two-Factor Authentication
content: Users who want to turn off two-factor authentication can do so in Settings under the Security section after verifying their identity.

title: Manage Notification Preferences
content: Users can control which email or in-app notifications they receive by adjusting their preferences in Settings under the Notifications section.

title: Upload Profile Picture
content: Users can upload or change their profile picture by visiting the Profile section and selecting a new image from their device.

title: View Login Activity
content: Users can review recent login attempts and device activity from Settings in the Security section under Login Activity.

title: Logout from All Devices
content: If users want to end all active sessions, they can log out from every device by selecting the Logout from All Devices option in Settings under Security.

title: Change Password
content: Users can update their password anytime by going to Settings, opening the Security section, and selecting Change Password.

title: Privacy Settings
content: Users can manage profile visibility, data sharing permissions, and privacy preferences in the Privacy section of Settings.

title: Download Account Data
content: Users can request and download a copy of their account data from Settings under the Privacy section by selecting Download Data.
